title: Chapter 181
content:

Follow my Facebook page too. I'll share the link as soon as I learn how to. I'm pretty new to this social media thing.

~~

[Repeated discharge assimilation of the user’s essence has been detected in Zara Hector]

[High-purity essence has enhanced the potential structure of the recipient]

[Analyzing effects on the body of the recipient]

[Target’s latent body potential has been successfully refined]

[Mana absorption efficiency of Zara Hector increased to 52%]

[Latent body quality has risen]

[Mana channels have improved]

[Overall compatibility with mana has increased]

[Target Zara Hector has failed to obtain a passive talent]

[Next chance to obtain a passive talent on 60% latent potential capacity]

I made my way back to my room while checking the system messages and what they implied. Once again, I couldn’t help but think of how broken this ability was.

I didn’t know what Zara’s mana absorption ability was before, but it increased to about 52%. Now, percentages I could talk about.

Five grades are divided by twenty percent each. Now, Zara was still in the third grade body at 52%, but it was close to the upper end of the middle stage of the third grade.

A typical talent was on this level. Grade four was for prodigies, and grade five was for people who were beyond common sense.

I suspected Elara was in the fourth grade, if not the fifth outright, which would be worrying, which meant it would be another five to seven years before I became capable enough of facing Elara even with the system’s help.

Anyway, it wasn’t just that.

You see, there are some talents a person is born with from birth. Such as a person who has good eyesight. A good eyesight in the sense that could spot things others couldn’t, such as weaknesses in some and such.

Or, a person who is born with a flexible body to the point they could pack themselves in a box, or someone who had a natural dodge ability and didn’t need to register anything to dodge anything, their bodies did that for them.

These are rare talents people were born with.

Talent with a sword, or weapons, and more on the line was also an example.

At the end of the notifications, it said that Zara had failed to acquire a talent, which I had to suspect was a talent like that, because a higher grade body had more talents in them, some hidden, some known.

If Zara’s latent potential could also help awaken these small talents, it could be groundbreaking. Just increasing her latent potential alone was enough for me to bash my head against a wall. What would I do if she, by chance, awakened an overpowered talent as well?

It would be fine if it were a small talent like magical fingers, slimy body, or something like that.

But what if it was a talent that made her body ever regenerating, or increased her healing power to the point she couldn’t be killed unless in one shot?

Yeah, that’s also an example of that.

Haa…

My head ached.

Just thinking about Jack’s abilities hurt my head. The headache was enough for me to even cry about it.

I opened the door of my room and found myself greeted by a sleeping beauty. A blonde beauty.

As much as my heart lurched at her sight, my dick could no longer harden due to the lack of mana, and it hasn’t restored to the point I could go for long. One round at most, and I knew for sure, I wouldn’t be able to stop at one.

Rayla’s body was naked and covered in my dried cum. As kinky as it was, the dried cum was also all over the sheets, and even if it was my own, I’d rather not sleep in that.

I used [Cleanse] with whatever mana I had, cleaning both Rayla and my bed before jumping in with her and hugging her from behind, feeling her soft ass against my legs and clutching her soft, heavenly tits tightly in my hands.

Let’s hope I have a good night and a day as good as today tomorrow.

Only…

“We’re going to the Royal Castle.”

That’s… unexpected.
